title: Debut! Star Detective Precure!
overview: On Anna Akechi’s 14th birthday, she puts on a pendant and meets a fairy named Pochitan.

title: Introducing the Genius, Jett-Senpai!
overview: Mikuru takes Anna to the CUREtto Detective Agency.

title: Everyone Come to the CUREtto Detective Agency!
overview: As black petals flutter and anxiety spreads throughout town, Uta proposes holding a concert and inviting a "special guest."

title: Exciting! Our First Client!
overview: The CUREtto Detective Agency gets its first client.

title: Star Detectives In Trouble?
overview: Anna goes to Makoto Mirai Academy, Mikuru’s school, to give Mikuru an umbrella, but then she meets a troubled woman named Mariko who is looking for her little sister Keiko. Meanwhile, Mikuru is asked by the school’s Chairwoman to solve a case involving a ghost in the high school.

title: Miraculous Pre-Kit Mirror Loupe!
overview: Mikuru leaves the care of exhausted Pochitan to Anna and Jett-senpai.

title: Yikes! The School Is a Maze?
overview: Anna transfers to Mikuru's class at Makoto Mirai Academy. While surprised at the size of the campus, she and Mikuru find themselves lost in a puzzle maze created by Goemon.

title: Pretty Smiles at Pretty Holic!
overview: Anna and Mikuru convince Jett-senpai to make merchandise from his Pre-Kit inventions and open a store.

title: Don't Make Assumptions!
overview: A very popular actress, Shiruku Ieiri, comes to Makoto Mirai Academy to film a TV program which has her joining in on a play as a member of the drama club. But right before the performance a very special costume goes missing from the club office.

title: Solve the Mystery of the Painting!
overview: A client comes to the CUREtto Detective Agency, asking them to help solve a mystery.

title: Cure Arcana Shadow Appears!
overview: A calling card from the Phantom Thieves’ Guild is sent to the Hosho Art Museum. Anna and Mikuru arrive on the scene, there Luluka strikes a conversation with Anna while in the Starlight Princess display room.

title: The Secret of Cure Arcana Shadow
overview: Anna and Mikuru set out on a fact-finding mission to learn more about Cure Arcana Shadow.

title: Star Detectives VS Thieves
overview: Anna and the gang chase after Nijee, who has stolen a toy robot. As they face off against the Hanninda, Luluka comes with a message: Maestro Usonoir is on the move.
